message:
refactor(benches): migrate from criterion::black_box to std::hint::black_box

Replace deprecated criterion::black_box re-export with std::hint::black_box
across all 7 benchmark files. The criterion crate deprecated its black_box
in favor of the stabilized std version (stable since Rust 1.66).

Also applies minor variable renames in socket_throughput bench for clarity:
- frames -> frame_count
- framed -> use_framing

Files: compression_bypass, outcome_adapter, shard_routing, socket_throughput,
storage_regression, topology_serialization, watcher_loop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
